title: 自定义分析 Prompt
summary: Implementation correctly delivers all acceptance criteria for the custom analysis prompt feature. The code follows existing patterns, has proper test coverage, and adheres to project conventions.

issues.description: Unrelated formatting changes (cargo fmt) mixed with feature changes. While valid, it's better to keep formatting changes in separate commits for cleaner git history.
Unrelated formatting changes (cargo fmt) mixed with feature changes. Same as above.

strengths: Clean separation of concerns: backend exposes the constant via a simple Tauri command
Consistent with existing patterns: command registered with #[cfg(feature = "screenshot")] like other auto_perception commands
Proper error handling in frontend: try/catch with showError for failed API calls
User-friendly UX: Toast notification confirms reset action
Modal follows existing UI patterns in SettingsModal.vue with proper z-index layering
Tests cover key functionality: both backend (returns expected content) and frontend (button clicks, modal display)
